title: Nectarine Crumble
description: A sweet Mexican-inspired dessert featuring a crunchy crumble topping and caramelized nectarines.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine sliced nectarines, granulated sugar, and a pinch of salt. Let it sit for 15 minutes, until the nectarines release their juices.

In a separate bowl, combine flour, brown sugar, and baking powder. Add the cold fatty and use a pastry blender or your fingers to work it into the dry ingredients until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Transfer the nectarine mixture to a 9x9-inch baking dish and top with the crumble mixture.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the crumble is golden brown and the nectarines are caramelized.
Remove from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
